system.flavor: You heft a long spear with tremendous force, pinning your foe to the ground.
system.effect:
Dominant max range by +3 against targets on lower elevation.
Effect [X]: You deal 2 piercing damage to a foe in range. That foe must save or be immobilized until the start of their next turn. A foe can end this immobilize early by taking 1d6 piercing damage any time during their turn.
